title: farmers refuge
description: a complete overhaul of minecraft's farming system with a main focus on farmers delight to make a peaceful adventure across the world to find delicious ingredients and foods and make your magnus opes and other perfect dishes.
body: a complete overhaul of minecraft's farming system with a main focus on farmers delight to make a peaceful adventure across the world to find delicious ingredients and foods and make your magnus opes and other perfect dishes With mods like farmers delight it adds features such as multible different cooking systems, qol farming features, and better progression of farming.
